articles.title: OpenAI’s Sam Altman takes the stand to fend off Elon Musk’s accusations he ‘stole a charity’ - NPR
articles.description: The trial pits two of tech's most famous personalities against each other and could lead to seismic changes for the maker of ChatGPT.
articles.content:
OpenAI CEO Sam Altman took the stand on Tuesday to defend himself against accusations from co-founder-turned-adversary Elon Musk that he "stole a charity
" by converting the maker of ChatGPT into a … [+4047 chars]
